volumeTitle: The Little Carthaginian. Pseudolus. The Rope
label: Pseudolus (Section 5.2.1323 - Section 5.2.1335)

sections.label: Section 5.2.1323
sections.original: Non : mé dices avidum ésse hominem nam hinc númquam eris nummo dívitior ;
sections.translation: No : you shall say that I really am a greedy fellow ; for you shall never be richer by a single coin of this money .

sections.label: Section 5.2.1324
sections.original: neque té mei tergi mísereret , si hoc nón hodie ecfecíssem .
sections.translation: and no compassion would you have had for my back , if I hadn ’ t this day managed this .

sections.label: Section 5.2.1325
sections.original: Erit úbi te ulciscar , sí vivo .
sections.translation: There will be an opportunity for me to be revenged on you , if I live .

sections.label: Section 5.2.1325b
sections.translation: Why do you threaten ? I ’ ve got a back of my own .

sections.label: Section 5.2.1326
sections.translation: Very well , then . ( Moves as if going .)

sections.label: Section 5.2.1326d
sections.translation: Only come you back ; you shall not be deceived .

sections.label: Section 5.2.1327b
sections.translation: Come and have a drink with me .

sections.label: Section 5.2.1327d
sections.translation: Do as I ask you . If you do come , I ’ ll let you take half of this , or even more .

sections.label: Section 5.2.1328b
sections.translation: I ’ ll come ; take me where you like , Pseudolus .

sections.label: Section 5.2.1329
sections.original: Quid núnc ? numquid íratus és aut mihi aút filió propter hás res , Simó ?
sections.translation: How now then ? Are you at all angry with me or with your son , Simo , on account of these matters ?

sections.label: Section 5.2.1330
sections.original: Té sequor . quín vocas spéctatorés simul ?
sections.translation: I follow you . But why don ’ t you invite the Spectators as well ?

sections.label: Section 5.2.1331
sections.translation: I ’ faith , they are not in the habit of inviting me ; and , therefore , I don ’ t invite them . But if you ( addressing the AUDIENCE ) are willing to applaud and approve of this company of players , and this Comedy ,
